data.title: Kraken Sheds ‘Hundreds’ of Jobs to Streamline Business Ahead of IPO, Sources Say
data.description:
• Kraken has laid off "hundreds" of staff across all areas of the business over the past several months, as the firm continues to streamline its operations ahead of a potential public listing in the U.S., people familiar with the matter told CoinDesk.
  • At the end of October last year, Kraken laid off 400 staff, or about 15% of its workforce, when Silicon Valley investor and Kraken board member Arjun Sethi became co-CEO.

data.title: LayerZero's ZRO Jumps 10% as VC Firm Andreessen Horowitz Buys $55M Worth
data.description:
• LayerZero's token (ZRO) surged after Andreessen Horowitz's (a16z) crypto arm acquired additional $55 million of tokens.
  • The investment includes a 3-year lock-up period and follows previous funding rounds in 2022 and 2023.
  • LayerZero facilitates cross-chain communication for 125 blockchains and supports projects like Wyoming's stablecoin issuance.

data.title: Solana Surges 4.5% as Canada Launches First Spot ETFs
data.description:
• Solana's price rose over 4% amid global economic tensions, outperforming the broader crypto market.
  • The $125-$127 range has become a critical support zone for SOL, successfully rejecting multiple downside attempts.
  • Canada launched the first spot Solana ETFs in North America, boosting institutional interest in the token.

data.title: Crypto Stock Tracking ETF Coming Soon From VanEck
data.description:
• VanEck has received SEC approval to launch the Onchain Economy ETF (NODE), which will actively manage 30-60 stocks tied to the digital asset sector.
  • NODE’s portfolio may include crypto exchanges, miners, data centers, semiconductors, and up to 25% in crypto ETPs.
  • The fund is scheduled to begin trading May 14 and will use a Cayman Islands subsidiary for indirect exposure to derivatives.

data.title: Stellar Sees $3B of Real World Assets Coming On-Chain in 2025
data.description:
• The Stellar Development Foundation is aiming for a 10x increase in the value of real-world assets held on-chain compared with last year.
  • As well as existing partnerships with Franklin Templeton and Wisdom Tress, Stellar is working with Paxos, Ondo, Etherfuse and SG Forge.

data.title: Lombard Finance Launches Toolkit to Unlock Bitcoin’s $154B DeFi Opportunity
data.description:
• Lombard Finance has launched a software development kid that enables BTC staking with minimal setup.
  • Bybit and Binance are among the early adoptions of the SDK, which targets $154 billion in idle bitcoin.
  • The toolkit allows platforms to unlock a new revenue stream and keep users engaged, the protocol says.

data.title: XRP Downside Fears Persist Despite ETF Optimism, Options Data Show
data.description:
• Deribit's options market shows a preference for put options on XRP, indicating concerns about potential price declines.
  • XRP's recent price movement suggests a possible re-test of lows around $1.6, despite its strong order book depth.

data.title: Bitcoin, Gold, and the Minsky Moment: Novogratz on the End of Fiscal Complacency
data.description:
• Bitcoin and gold are report cards on financial stewardship, says Novogratz, highlighting a flight to safe assets as deficits and political uncertainty shake investor confidence.
  • U.S. entering uncharted territory with interest rates climbing and the dollar weakening, Novogratz sees the market finally starting to care about America's $35 trillion debt load.

data.title: Auradine Raises $153M Series C for Bitcoin Mining, AI Data Center Networking
data.description:
• Auradine, a maker of computing rigs for bitcoin mining and AI, raised $153 million in a Series C funding round.
  • The Silicon Valley, California-based company also formed AuraLinks AI, focused on open-standards to address cooling requirements of next-generation AI data centers.
  • The funding round, which took Auradine's total backing to $300 million, was led by StepStone Group and included contribution from BTC miner MARA.

data.title: Bitcoin, the Haven Crypto Bulls Hoped for, Is More a Barometer of Risk: Godbole
data.description:
• Bitcoin, with a strong positive correlation to the Aussie dollar-yen rate, is becoming even more of a barometer of risk as the U.S.-China trade war progresses.
  • The correlation with gold now stands at -0.80, indicating the two tend to move in opposite directions.
